      About this item

      • BIGGER, YET SLIMMER THAN EVER: Who would’ve guessed that wider could also be lighter? The design of Galaxy Z Fold7 is refined to feel like a traditional smartphone with its expanded cover display.
      • BEST CAMERA ON A FOLD YET: You asked for more – now you can have the most. Galaxy Z Fold7 now boasts an ultra-premium 200MP camera with Pro-Visual Engine so you can effortlessly take incredibly detailed pics.
      • SCREENSHARE FOR STREAMLINED ASSISTANCE: Intrigued by something you see? Go Live with Google Gemini, then screenshare or point your camera at it for additional info or assistance on the fly.¹
      • DO AND VIEW MORE, ALL AT ONCE: With an 8” screen that allows you to view up to three windows at once, Galaxy Z Fold7 is the ultimate device for seeing and doing more.²
      • ALL THE POWER AND SPEED YOU NEED Smoothly run your day with the power and speed of Galaxy Z Fold7. With its customized Snapdragon 8 Elite processor for Galaxy, you can stream your favorite shows, edit photos, scroll social feeds and more with ease.³
      • TIME-TESTED TOUGHNESS: With a new, advanced Armor Aluminum frame and a Corning Gorilla Glass Ceramic 2 display, Galaxy Z Fold7 is built to handle whatever your on-the-go lifestyle throws at it.⁴
      • STAY LOCKED IN WITHOUT BEING PLUGGED IN: Create, work and game to the max – the battery life of Galaxy Z Fold7 is able to keep up with your busiest days.⁵
      • BETTER TOGETHER TO BETTER YOUR HEALTH: Conveniently track your health on the go with Galaxy Watch8 Classic, and then get deeper insights on the expansive screen of Z Fold7.⁶
      • EXPAND THE WAYS YOU STAY AHEAD: With Galaxy Z Fold7, you get to decide how to stay ahead. See your daily briefings at a glance on the cover screen, or unfold your phone for an expansive view.
      Show more
      › See more product details

        Sustainability features

        This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.
        Safer chemicals
        Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.
        As certified by
        ECOLOGO

        ECOLOGO

        ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life. An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. Products are evaluated on the applicable criteria through testing and auditing.
        Energy efficiency
        Conserves energy compared to similar products.
        As certified by

        As certified by
        EPEAT

        EPEAT

        EPEAT certifies electronic products based on sustainability impacts across their life cycle including requirements for energy efficiency and end-of-life management. An EPEAT registered product can also meet optional more ambitious criteria including reduction of fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-GHGs). Products meeting 50% - 74% optional criteria are 'Silver' and those meeting 75% or more are 'Gold'.

        Certification Level

        GOLD

      Product Description

      Expand what’s possible with Galaxy Z Fold7, the foldable that’s designed to do so much more than before.

      The expanded 6.5" cover display is made to feel like a traditional smartphone, making it more convenient to handle daily tasks— from text replies to checking the weather— without needing to unfold. For even more possibilities, open up the impressive 8" screen to create, unwind, multitask and more.

      For the first time ever for a foldable, Z Fold7 boasts a 200MP camera with ProVisual Engine so you can take stunning photos with ease. Perfecting your pics feels just as effortless. Enjoy plenty of room on the expansive inner screen to make tiny adjustments, like zooming in to delete that stranger in the background with Photo Assist or ensuring everyone’s eyes are open in the group selfie with Best Face.

      Whether you’re at home or on the go, creating on the large screen of Z Fold7 is as comfortable as it gets. View up to three windows at once and edit your content on one side while streaming videos and scrolling social feeds on the other. While you multitask, the customized Snapdragon® 8 Elite processor for Galaxy keeps your experiences smooth from start to finish.

      ¹ Results for illustrative purposes and may vary. Check responses for accuracy. Compatible with certain features and with certain accounts. Internet connection required. Available on select devices, languages, and countries. Only available to users 18 years and older. Gemini is a trademark of Google.
      ² Display measurements are diagonal, and actual viewable area is less due to rounded corners and camera hole punch.
      ³ Snapdragon is a product of Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. and/or its subsidiaries.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find the phone to be a premium device with excellent screen resolution and a huge internal display. They appreciate its thin design and consider it worth the price. The functionality and durability receive mixed reviews - while some find it highly functional and durable, others report issues with the S-pen not working and the phone breaking too easily. Battery life is also mixed, with some saying it lasts a good long time while others find it bad.
      AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

      101 customers mention quality, 99 positive, 2 negative101 customers mention "Quality"99 positive2 negative
      Customers praise the phone's quality, describing it as a great piece of technology.
      "Great phone. I've had the z fold 2 , zfold 4 but the z fold 7 is the wow factor of them all so thin and faster I'm in love with this phone" Read more
      "Amazing phone. However, I don't hardly ever open up the fold. Battery lasts a good long time. Very responsive and quick. Way over priced!!!..." Read more
      "Excellent phone, really cool. Took me a while to get used to it but it's awesome :)" Read more
      "Absolutely the best phone I have ever had. Great deal too." Read more
      34 customers mention screen quality, 27 positive, 7 negative34 customers mention "Screen quality"27 positive7 negative
      Customers praise the phone's screen quality, noting its excellent resolution, with one customer mentioning it captures crisp and clear photos and videos.
      "...The screen is vibrant, sharp, and perfect for multitasking—whether you're browsing, working, or gaming. Performance is lightning fast...." Read more
      "...The screen is amazing as well. The phone feels perfectly built. The sound blows me away...." Read more
      "...The screen is incredible...." Read more
      "Screen started acting funny and stopped working after a month. I love Samsung but this is not it...." Read more
      30 customers mention screen size, 28 positive, 2 negative30 customers mention "Screen size"28 positive2 negative
      Customers appreciate the phone's screen size, noting its huge internal display and compact design. One customer specifically mentions enjoying reading in full display with bigger font.
      "...phone itself is a gem, highly recomended for its functionality and large screen..amazon seems to always have a good supply of quality items from..." Read more
      "...I love the bigger screen that the fold series offer. Now. I jumped into the z fold world at z fold 4...." Read more
      "...It is a real treat to have a device that is this compact and so functional. In terms of weight, it is lighter than my old non-fold phone...." Read more
      "...The phone is thinner than the Z-Fold 5, and also has a larger screen...." Read more
      30 customers mention thinness, 23 positive, 7 negative30 customers mention "Thinness"23 positive7 negative
      Customers appreciate the phone's thinness, describing it as super slim.
      "...ever have a chance to get one in your hands, you’ll be amazed by how thin and light it is for a foldable, let alone a slab phone...." Read more
      "...I really appreciate the thinness; it was hard to find a case that preserved the thinness of the phone but I eventually did." Read more
      "...Yes mine is used. Bigger screen, more bells and whistles, thinner and lighter and hopefully no hinge issues...." Read more
      "...The phone is crazy thin and the best part for me is the outer screen is finally a size of a normal phone with the benefits of a 8 inch tablet when..." Read more
      48 customers mention functionality, 31 positive, 17 negative48 customers mention "Functionality"31 positive17 negative
      Customers have mixed experiences with the phone's functionality, with some finding it highly functional while others report that it no longer works or that the S-pen does not function properly.
      "...Its been a few months since ive had the phone and ive no issues. Except for one but its not the phones fault i dont think...." Read more
      "...A phone doesn't really work unless all the parts are there." Read more
      "I love this phone so much. It does everything I need and then some. The screen is amazing in so many ways. I love the color of this phone as well...." Read more
      "So far I have no problem with my phone. It is in good working condition so far." Read more
      40 customers mention value for money, 19 positive, 21 negative40 customers mention "Value for money"19 positive21 negative
      Customers have mixed opinions about the phone's value for money, with some finding it worth the price while others consider it pricey.
      "...The batter last all day and night and still has 40% left. It's pricy but it's the best!" Read more
      "It’s worth the price" Read more
      "...Don't get me wrong the price is steep but to be able to use my phone that functions as a tablet at work really helps pass the time...." Read more
      "...Fun to use. A bit on the pricey side,but worth it. Screen is perfectly sized." Read more
      33 customers mention battery life, 19 positive, 14 negative33 customers mention "Battery life"19 positive14 negative
      Customers have mixed opinions about the phone's battery life, with some finding it amazing while others report it is bad and the charging speed is not great.
      "...of the Pixel 10 fold, typing, and screen, a better iP rating, and battery life, but it lags in power and features...." Read more
      "...The battery is not great, to be honest, but I am a very heavy user so I was not surprised by that...." Read more
      "...Battery life: After weeks of use, I can confirm the battery lasts all day...." Read more
      "Finding a case is a challenge. Expensive phone. Battery could last longer. Otherwise, great...." Read more
      24 customers mention durability, 14 positive, 10 negative24 customers mention "Durability"14 positive10 negative
      Customers have mixed opinions about the phone's durability, with some finding it very durable while others report that it breaks too easily and the paint scratches off.
      "...is very thin but dont let that thinnest fool you, This is a very durable phone!..." Read more
      "while the device works great , the center screen breaks too easily just from opening and closing. it also costs 700 Dollars to replace...." Read more
      "...the prior versions of the device And for a pricey phone it is quite sturdy makeing it surprisingly adept for day to day use" Read more
      "...It’s a great phone, only thing it needs is a sturdy case, I put an OtterBox defender on mine." Read more

      Product Summary: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 Cell Phone, 256GB AI Smartphone, Unlocked Android, AI Photo Edits, Large Screen, Long Battery Life, 2025, US 1 Yr Manufacturer Warranty, Blue Shadow

      From Samsung

      4.5 out of 5 stars, 729 ratings

      Customer reviews

      100+ bought in past month

      Price

      No featured offers available

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • BIGGER, YET SLIMMER THAN EVER: Who would’ve guessed that wider could also be lighter? The design of Galaxy Z Fold7 is refined to feel like a traditional smartphone with its expanded cover display.
      • BEST CAMERA ON A FOLD YET: You asked for more – now you can have the most. Galaxy Z Fold7 now boasts an ultra-premium 200MP camera with Pro-Visual Engine so you can effortlessly take incredibly detailed pics.
      • SCREENSHARE FOR STREAMLINED ASSISTANCE: Intrigued by something you see? Go Live with Google Gemini, then screenshare or point your camera at it for additional info or assistance on the fly.¹
      • DO AND VIEW MORE, ALL AT ONCE: With an 8” screen that allows you to view up to three windows at once, Galaxy Z Fold7 is the ultimate device for seeing and doing more.²
      • ALL THE POWER AND SPEED YOU NEED Smoothly run your day with the power and speed of Galaxy Z Fold7. With its customized Snapdragon 8 Elite processor for Galaxy, you can stream your favorite shows, edit photos, scroll social feeds and more with ease.³
      • TIME-TESTED TOUGHNESS: With a new, advanced Armor Aluminum frame and a Corning Gorilla Glass Ceramic 2 display, Galaxy Z Fold7 is built to handle whatever your on-the-go lifestyle throws at it.⁴
      • STAY LOCKED IN WITHOUT BEING PLUGGED IN: Create, work and game to the max – the battery life of Galaxy Z Fold7 is able to keep up with your busiest days.⁵
      • BETTER TOGETHER TO BETTER YOUR HEALTH: Conveniently track your health on the go with Galaxy Watch8 Classic, and then get deeper insights on the expansive screen of Z Fold7.⁶
      • EXPAND THE WAYS YOU STAY AHEAD: With Galaxy Z Fold7, you get to decide how to stay ahead. See your daily briefings at a glance on the cover screen, or unfold your phone for an expansive view.

      Product Description

      Expand what’s possible with Galaxy Z Fold7, the foldable that’s designed to do so much more than before.

      The expanded 6.5" cover display is made to feel like a traditional smartphone, making it more convenient to handle daily tasks— from text replies to checking the weather— without needing to unfold. For even more possibilities, open up the impressive 8" screen to create, unwind, multitask and more.

      For the first time ever for a foldable, Z Fold7 boasts a 200MP camera with ProVisual Engine so you can take stunning photos with ease. Perfecting your pics feels just as effortless. Enjoy plenty of room on the expansive inner screen to make tiny adjustments, like zooming in to delete that stranger in the background with Photo Assist or ensuring everyone’s eyes are open in the group selfie with Best Face.

      Whether you’re at home or on the go, creating on the large screen of Z Fold7 is as comfortable as it gets. View up to three windows at once and edit your content on one side while streaming videos and scrolling social feeds on the other. While you multitask, the customized Snapdragon® 8 Elite processor for Galaxy keeps your experiences smooth from start to finish.

      ¹ Results for illustrative purposes and may vary. Check responses for accuracy. Compatible with certain features and with certain accounts. Internet connection required. Available on select devices, languages, and countries. Only available to users 18 years and older. Gemini is a trademark of Google. ² Display measurements are diagonal, and actual viewable area is less due to rounded corners and camera hole punch. ³ Snapdragon is a product of Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. and/or its subsidiaries.
